Sandbox._EnvironmentUrl_comment: When set, the harness re-registers the sandbox env at this URL via reg-web-app before tests. In CI set via McpE2E__Sandbox__EnvironmentUrl=%DeployedUrl%.
Sandbox._ApplicationPoolName_comment: Optional explicit IIS pool for the destructive uninstall-warning proof. TeamCity reads its ApplicationPoolName build parameter automatically.
Sandbox._DatabaseProvider_comment: Set to postgresql to enable PostgreSQL catalog assertions (McpE2E__Sandbox__DatabaseProvider=postgresql in CI).
